flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Stevens Institute of Technology fell 17% between 2006 and 2009 (36.0% → 29.9%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Stevens Institute of Technology rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($56.9k → $63.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Stevens Institute of Technology rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($56.9k → $63.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Stevens Institute of Technology fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.4% → 0.0%).
